open_feedback: The signup was okay but the phone verification felt unnecessary. Once I got in, the product was great.
I almost gave up during onboarding. Too many mandatory steps before I could explore.
Quick setup for me but I'm technical. I worry about my less technical team members.
The invite flow was confusing. I accidentally sent invites to people before I was ready.
Phone verification is a dealbreaker for research participants I might want to onboard.
Perfect for me. Quick setup, powerful features. Love the API access.
I felt lost after onboarding. Too many features, no clear starting point.
Good product but the onboarding wizard needs work. Make it shorter and optional.
Technical setup was fine. The Jira import tool saved us hours.
Gave up the first time. Only came back because a colleague showed me how to skip the wizard.
The content areas could use better formatting options. But overall solid.
Works well for our Agile workflow. The sprint view is excellent.
The onboarding is good but very comprehensive which is great for the tool.
Enterprise features are good. SSO setup was smooth.
Way too complicated for someone just starting out. Need a simpler mode.
Great for Agile teams. The board view is intuitive.
Beautiful design but the navigation is inconsistent between views.
Good research repository features. Wish it had better analysis tools built in.
I appreciate the helpful UI during signup and onboarding.
Solid tool. The roadmap feature is what sold me.
